task:
Create the following user snippets (persisted under `~/.config/Code/User/snippets/`):

`typescript.json`:
- prefix `iface` — body `interface IName {\n    \n}` — description `TypeScript interface`
- prefix `asyncfn` — body `async function name() {\n    \n}` — description `Async function`

`go.json`:
- prefix `mainfn` — body `package main\n\nfunc main() {\n    \n}` — description `Go main function`
- prefix `errcheck` — body `if err != nil {\n    return err\n}` — description `Error check`

`rust.json`:
- prefix `impl` — body `impl Name {\n    \n}` — description `Rust impl block`
- prefix `derive` — body `#[derive(Debug, Clone)]` — description `Derive macro`
